description: tiptoi 2nd-gen pen, ZC3202N with Micron (MT) NAND. German build N0038MT / 20131009. This is the flagship variant: fully analysed, and the one that matches the maintainer's real pen.

PROG.bin.role: full firmware image; the primary Ghidra import (flat load at loader_base)

nandboot.bin.role: ANYKANB1 NANDboot blob, mapped at 0x07ff8000; supplies the bootrom HAL names

producer.bin.role: factory USB-flashing / provisioning stage (not used by the naming pipeline)

codepage.bin.role: GB/codepage tables (not used by the naming pipeline)
